summary: Service Template MVP Testing Complete - All critical features working. Fixed backend bug causing 500 errors on /my-requests and /my-assigned endpoints (duplicate is_sla_breached keyword). Verified: 9 service templates displayed, tailored forms render correctly for Video Editing 60s and YouTube Long Form, form validation works, order submission with service_template_id creates order with service_fields and auto-resolves hidden category L1.
seed_data_creation: Service templates seeded to MongoDB 'service_templates' collection (9 templates)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Template MVP fully tested and working. Bug fixed in orders.py (duplicate is_sla_breached). All 9 service cards display at /services. Clicking card shows tailored form inline. Form validation works (shows toast on missing required fields). Submission creates order with service_template_id, service_name, service_fields. Hidden category L1 auto-resolved from template.

frontend_ui_tests.all_service_card_names_correct: PASS - Video Editing 60s Reels, Story Editing, Long Form Video Editing, YouTube Long Form Editing, Thumbnail Design, Social Media Graphics, Content Writing, Email Campaign Support, Website Updates
frontend_ui_tests.video_editing_form_fields_correct: PASS - footage_links, platform, goal, reference_links, captions, hook_script, priority, deadline, special_notes
frontend_ui_tests.youtube_form_has_youtube_specific_fields: PASS - video_length_target, youtube_title_topic, audience_goal, cta_offer, chapter_markers, thumbnail_needed
frontend_ui_tests.form_validation_shows_error_toast: PASS - 'Please enter a request title', 'Platform is required'

bug_fixes_applied.root_cause: OrderResponse() receiving duplicate 'is_sla_breached' keyword - once from **order spread and once as explicit kwarg
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added order_copy = {k: v for k, v in order.items() if k != 'is_sla_breached'} before creating OrderResponse

service_fields.goal: Drive engagement for product launch campaign
